headline: Costco fixes its biggest customer pain points
summary: For much of its existence, Costco did not focus on shopping experience because its core goal was keeping prices low. The company famously uses warehouses — literally pallets of merchandise on the floor — as its stores to eliminate the cost of moving inventory from the back to the front. Every ...

headline: JPMorgan Expects Kroger (KR) to Reiterate Guidance, Lowers Price Target
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is included among the 10 Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. On June 11, JPMorgan lowered its price recommendation on The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) to $70 from $72 while keeping a Neutral rating on the stock. The change comes ahead of the company’s fiscal first-quarter earnings […]

headline: Costco Wholesale (COST) Stock Valuation After Strong May Sales And Growing Digital And Gas Volumes
summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) just reported May net sales of US$24.01b, an increase of 14.5% year over year, alongside strong gains in gas and digital channels. However, the stock has recently faced volatility driven by valuation concerns. See our latest analysis for Costco Wholesale. Despite strong May sales and record gas volumes, Costco's recent pullback, with a 30 day share price return down 6.35%, reflects investors reassessing valuation. This comes even as the year to date share price return...
